parentScopeBlock:
# Parent #278 -- Phase 2: Contract-first TikTok Shop read sync and sandbox write validation

(Constant for all children of #278.)

## Epic north star
Contract-first TikTok Shop integration: verify Layer 0 API contracts before writing
any client code, isolate Fujiwa (production-read) from SANDBOX_VN (write-validation)
by merchant auth ID and capability, then build Layer 1 read sync -> ETL -> Layer 2
sandbox write validation -> P2-A3 feature aggregates.

## Epic deferrals
- T8 router / trained ML inference: Phase 4, not P2
- web/, ios/: out of P2-A1..P2-A3 scope
- Marketing API: out of Shop Partner API scope
- Coupon operations (#34-37 in contract-collection.md): investigated and removed --
  no seller-facing create-coupon operation exists in the Partner API

## Merchants (never cross these)
- Fujiwa (`7658073774813611784`): production-read only, never write-capable
- SANDBOX_VN (`7658096633384781588`): write-validation only, never production data

## Data-source policy
- TikTok Partner API only, per `docs/architecture/data-sources.md`
- Business failures from sparse sandbox data are acceptable; the P2-A1 sandbox-write
  bar is technical validation (signing, HTTP status/TikTok code, response parsing),
  documented per `docs/handoffs/phase-2-tiktok-implementation.md`

## Shared handoff decisions
- Layer 0 contract verification (HITL, API Testing Tool cURL capture) happens before
  any resource code for that endpoint is written
- Every Layer 2 write path must be unreachable from `ProductionReadClientFactory` /
  `ProductionReadResources`, enforced at the transport-guard layer before signing
